channel.title: Productivity on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Productivity on Arrans github.io

item.title: wavetermdev/waveterm
item.description: An open-source, cross-platform terminal for seamless workflows

item.title: tasks/tasks
item.description: Bringing Astrid Tasks back from the dead

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: excalidraw/excalidraw
item.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams

item.title: iib0011/omni-tools
item.description: Self-hosted collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks. No ads, no tracking, just fast, accessible utilities right from your browser!

item.title: basicmachines-co/basic-memory
item.description: AI conversations that actually remember. Never re-explain your project to your AI again. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/tyvKNccgqN

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: passbolt/passbolt_api
item.description: Passbolt Community Edition (CE) API. The JSON API for the open source password manager for teams!

item.title: brufdev/many-notes
item.description: Markdown note-taking web application designed for simplicity

item.title: omnivore-app/omnivore
item.description: Omnivore is a complete, open source read-it-later solution for people who like reading.

item.title: Smaug6739/Alexandrie
item.description: A fast, open-source Markdown note-taking app for students and creators

item.title: Volmarg/personal-management-system
item.description: Your web application for managing personal data. personal.management.system.inbox@gmail.com

item.title: Ebrizzzz/Youtube-playlist-to-formatted-text
item.description: A desktop application that extracts YouTube playlist transcripts and enhances them using Google’s Gemini AI models. The output is a book in any language you want.

item.title: owlistic-notes/owlistic
item.description: 🦉 Free open-source notetaking app with real-time sync 🔄⚡️🚀
